name: Add Missing Commands

tasks.title: Add wolfcastle audit enrich section to CLI spec
tasks.description: Add wolfcastle audit enrich section to CLI spec
tasks.body:
Write a full spec section for 'wolfcastle audit enrich' in the same format as existing audit subcommand sections (Synopsis, Description, Arguments and Flags, Behavior, Output, Exit Codes, Examples, Error Cases). The command is defined in cmd/audit/enrich.go. Key details:
- Use: 'enrich [text]'
- Takes one positional arg (enrichment text) and a required --node flag
- Appends text to a node's AuditEnrichment list in state.json
- Silently deduplicates
- Returns JSON in --json mode with action 'audit_enrich'
- Fails if text is empty or --node is missing

Insert the section in alphabetical order among the audit subcommands (after audit enrich, before audit escalate).
acceptance_criteria: Section matches the format and depth of existing audit subcommand specs
and error cases from cmd/audit/enrich.go are documented

tasks.title: Add wolfcastle orchestrator criteria section to CLI spec
tasks.description: Add wolfcastle orchestrator criteria section to CLI spec
tasks.body:
Write a full spec section for 'wolfcastle orchestrator criteria' in the same format as existing command sections. The command is defined in cmd/orchestrator/criteria.go. Key details:
- Use: 'criteria [criterion]'
- Takes optional positional arg (criterion text) and required --node flag
- Has --list flag to show existing criteria instead of adding
- Appends criterion to node's SuccessCriteria list in state.json
- Silently deduplicates
- Fails if neither criterion text nor --list is provided
- Returns JSON in --json mode with action 'success_criteria' (list) or 'success_criteria_add' (add)

This is a new command group ('orchestrator') that needs a parent group entry in the spec. Insert it in the Work Management group, after project create.
acceptance_criteria: Section matches the format and depth of existing command specs
and error cases from cmd/orchestrator/criteria.go are documented
The orchestrator command group is mentioned in the spec header/overview

tasks.title: Add wolfcastle task amend section to CLI spec
tasks.description: Add wolfcastle task amend section to CLI spec
tasks.body:
Write a full spec section for 'wolfcastle task amend' in the same format as existing task subcommand sections. The command is defined in cmd/task/amend.go. Key details:
- Use: 'amend'
- Required --node flag (task address: node-path/task-id)
- Only works on not_started or blocked tasks; fails on in_progress or complete
- Optional flags: --body (string), --add-deliverable (string slice), --add-constraint (string slice), --add-acceptance (string slice), --add-reference (string slice), --type (string, validated: discovery/spec/adr/implementation/integration/cleanup), --integration (string)
- Appends to list fields using deduplication (appendUnique helper)
- Returns JSON in --json mode with action 'task_amend'

Insert after task add section.
acceptance_criteria: Section matches the format and depth of existing task subcommand specs
and error cases from cmd/task/amend.go are documented

tasks.title: Audit
tasks.description: Verify all work in Add Missing Commands is complete and correct

audit_enrichment: Cross-reference each new spec section against its Go source file to verify all flags, error messages, and JSON output shapes are accurately documented

breadcrumbs.text: Added wolfcastle audit enrich spec section to CLI commands spec. Inserted alphabetically between breadcrumb and escalate sections. Documented synopsis, flags, behavior (including silent deduplication), JSON output shape, exit codes, examples, and error cases.

Added wolfcastle orchestrator criteria spec section to CLI commands spec. Inserted between project create and adr create in the Work Management group. Documented both add and list modes with synopsis, flags, behavior steps, dual JSON output shapes (success_criteria and success_criteria_add), exit codes, examples, and error cases. Updated spec header to include orchestrator in the subcommand group list.

Added wolfcastle task amend spec section to CLI commands spec. Inserted between task add and task claim sections. Documented synopsis, all 8 flags (including 4 repeatable slice flags with deduplication), state gating (not_started/blocked only), behavior steps, JSON output shape, exit codes, examples, and error cases.

Audit reviewed 3 new spec sections (audit enrich, orchestrator criteria, task amend) totaling ~310 lines added to docs/specs/2026-03-12T00-06Z-cli-commands.md. PASS. All JSON output shapes verified against source. Behavior steps, flag tables, error messages, and deduplication semantics match implementations. Two accepted findings: (1) enrich spec step ordering puts node load before text validation, but source checks text first — follows existing spec convention of documenting logical rather than execution order. (2) Exit code tables document distinct codes 2-5 but cobra returns 1 for all errors — pre-existing convention across the entire spec. Build clean, vet clean, all tests pass. Quality: clean, well-formatted, consistent with existing sections.

audit.result_summary: Added three missing CLI command spec sections to docs/specs/2026-03-12T00-06Z-cli-commands.md: wolfcastle audit enrich, wolfcastle orchestrator criteria, and wolfcastle task amend. Each section documents synopsis, flags, behavior steps, JSON output shapes, exit codes, examples, and error cases, matching the format of existing spec sections. All JSON output shapes and behavior details verified against source implementations. The orchestrator subcommand group was also added to the spec header's subcommand group list. Audit found no issues requiring remediation.

audit.objective: Verify all work in Add Missing Commands is complete and correct
audit.what_happened: Reviewed three new CLI spec sections (audit enrich, orchestrator criteria, task amend) against their source implementations. Verified JSON output shapes, flag tables, behavior steps, deduplication semantics, and error messages all match source. Ran build, vet, and full test suite — all clean.
went_well: All three sections match source accurately; JSON output shapes verified field-by-field
Formatting and structure perfectly consistent with existing spec sections
improvements: Enrich spec behavior steps document node loading before text validation, but source checks text first — minor ordering inaccuracy following existing convention
action_items: If explicit exit code handling is ever added to cobra commands, update the spec exit code tables to reflect actual behavior rather than aspirational codes

cli-command-spec-update/add-missing-comm.objective: Document the wolfcastle audit enrich command in the CLI spec
cli-command-spec-update/add-missing-comm.what_happened: Read cmd/audit/enrich.go to extract behavior details (deduplication, error messages, JSON output shape), then inserted a new spec section into docs/specs/2026-03-12T00-06Z-cli-commands.md between audit breadcrumb and audit escalate. Format matches existing audit subcommand sections exactly.
went_well: Source code was straightforward; all flags, error messages, and output format mapped cleanly to the spec template
improvements: The exit code mapping (2 for node not found, 3 for empty text) is inferred from the breadcrumb pattern since enrich.go uses fmt.Errorf without explicit exit codes
action_items: Verify exit code behavior matches spec if explicit exit code handling is added later

cli-command-spec-update/add-missing-comm.objective: Document the wolfcastle orchestrator criteria command in the CLI spec
cli-command-spec-update/add-missing-comm.what_happened: Read cmd/orchestrator/criteria.go and register.go to extract all behavior details (dual add/list modes, deduplication, flag requirements, error messages, JSON output shapes). Inserted a new spec section into docs/specs/2026-03-12T00-06Z-cli-commands.md between project create and adr create. Also added 'orchestrator' to the subcommand group list in the spec header.
went_well: Source code mapped cleanly to the spec template; both add and list modes have distinct JSON actions that were easy to document separately
The register.go GroupID assignment confirmed orchestrator belongs in the Work Management group
improvements: Exit code mapping for --node missing (code 1) is inferred from cobra's MarkFlagRequired behavior rather than explicit exit code handling in the command
action_items: Verify exit code behavior if explicit exit code handling is added to orchestrator commands later

task-0003.objective: Document the wolfcastle task amend command in the CLI spec
task-0003.what_happened: Read cmd/task/amend.go to extract all behavior details (state gating, flag semantics, deduplication logic, type validation, JSON output shape). Inserted a new spec section into docs/specs/2026-03-12T00-06Z-cli-commands.md between task add and task claim. Format matches existing task subcommand sections exactly.
went_well: Source code mapped cleanly to the spec template; the appendUnique deduplication behavior and state gating (not_started/blocked only) were straightforward to document
All optional flags including slice types documented with repeatable/deduplicated semantics
improvements: Exit codes are inferred from error patterns rather than explicit os.Exit calls in the source
action_items: Verify exit code mapping if explicit exit code handling is added to task amend later
